memoryArtifacts.description: Gerald FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare KG (born c. 1456 – c. 3 September 1513), known variously as "Garret the Great" (Gearóid Mór) or "The Great Earl" (An tIarla Mór), was Ireland's premier peer. He …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare於1455年1月出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊托時，他的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare34歲，母親Joan Cam Fitzgerald26歲。他於大約1470年與Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1504年登記服兵役。他於1509年被列為 lord justice of ireland。他去世於1513年9月3日在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利利阿普享年58歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare于1455年1月出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡斯特萊托时，他的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare34岁，母亲Joan Cam Fitzgerald26岁。他于大约1470年与Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1504年登记服兵役。他于1509年被列为 lord justice of ireland。他去世于1513年9月3日在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利利阿普享年58岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare was born in January 1455, in Castletown, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, was 34 and his mother, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, was 26. He married Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare about 1470, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 9 daughters. He registered for military service in 1504. In 1509, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as  lord justice of ireland. He died on 3 September 1513, in Leap, County Offaly, Ireland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare est né en janvier 1455, à Castletown, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare environ 1470, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 9 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1504. En 1509, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est  lord justice of ireland. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1513, à Leap, County Offaly, Irlande, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare im Januar 1455 in Castletown, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare 34 und seine Mutter Joan Cam Fitzgerald 26. Er hat um 1470 in Irland Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 9 Töchter. Er hat sich 1504 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1509, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als  lord justice of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. September 1513 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leap, County Offaly, Irland und wurde in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare è nato il nel gennaio 1455 nel Castletown, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare circa 1470, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 9 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1504. Nel 1509, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come  lord justice of ireland. Morì il 3 settembre 1513, nel Leap, County Offaly, Irlanda, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildareが1455年1月にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカストレトウンで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildareは34歳，母Joan Cam Fitzgeraldは26歳であった。約1470年にアイルランドでAlison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年に兵役登録をした。1509年，54歳の時，職業は lord justice of irelandと記録されている。彼は1513年9月3日にアイルランドコウントイ オファリーレアップで58歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare(이)가 1455년 1월 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카스틀레타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cam Fitzgerald(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 아일랜드에서 Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1509년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은  lord justice of ireland이었다. 그는 1513년 9월 3일 아일랜드 카운티 파리 리프에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에 묻혔다.

mn.January 1455–3 September 1513: 1455 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1513 оны Есдүгээр сарын 3

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare nasceu em janeiro de 1455, em Castletown, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare aproximadamente 1470, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 9 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1504. Em 1509, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como  lord justice of ireland. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1513, em Leap, County Offaly, Irlanda, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare родился январь 1455 г. в местности кастлетоун, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Cam Fitzgerald, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare около 1470 г. в местности Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 9 дочерей. В 1504 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1509 году, в возрасте 54 лет, работал по профессии  lord justice of ireland. Он умер 3 сентября 1513 г. в местности лип, коунти оффали, Ирландия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия.

sm.from 1504 to 1514: mai le 1504 e o'o I le 1514
sm.from 1496 to 1513: mai le 1496 e o'o I le 1513

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare nació en enero de 1455, en Castletown, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Cam Fitzgerald, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare aproximadamente 1470, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 9 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1504. En 1509, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era  lord justice of ireland. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1513, en Leap, County Offaly, Irlanda, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda.
